ocr.text:
## 圣勃朗鱼肚 ## DESCRIPTION 踏上瓦特纳冰原，凝视着冰川划过的痕迹，纵横交错，犹如不同的人生轨迹，曲折或顺利，进退之间，都化作一段奇妙的旅程。 As if stepping on the Vatnajokull,we gaze at the crisscrossing glaciers.Like different life trajectories,it's full of twists or success.Between advance and retreat,they all turn into a wonderful journey.
SPECIFICATION
DA2M78BR-Y-天鹅绒面1200X2400X12MM 12MM DB2M78BR-Y-天鹅绒面1600X3200X12MM 12 MM ## FEATURES
APPLYTO SPACE

ocr.text:
## 保加利亚浅灰 ## DESCRIPTION 保加利亚，“上帝的后花园”位于欧洲巴尔干半岛东南部，悠久的历史建筑，人文风情，从巴尔干山峰，到黑海岸边迷人的沙滩，独特的风景令人叹为观止。皎洁柔和的灰色线条交织，灵动得如舞动的月光，飘酒到纯粹的极简空间，保加利亚石材中的灰色系，弥足珍贵，抢眼夺目。 Bulgaria, the "God's Back Garden" is located in the southeastern part of the Balkan Peninsula in Europe. With a long history of architecture and cultural charm, the unique scenery from the Balkan peaks to the charming beaches along the Black Coast is breathtaking. The bright and soft gray lines interweave, as agile as dancing moonlight, flowing into pure minimalist spaces, The gray series in Bulgarian stone is precious and eye-catching. ## SPECIFICATION GA1632CY12A096N-粗哑面1600X3200X12MM 12 MM ## FEATURES
APPLY TO SPACE

ocr.text:
## 劳伦特 ## DESCRIPTION 白色与金属色纹理纵横交错，宛如墨染苍穹时的一缕曙光，摄人心魂，彰显气势磅礴器宇轩昂之势。 Like a ray of dawn across the sky stained with ink, the white and metallic textures are criss-crossed.lt captures people'hearts and souls, demonstrats the majestice, nergetic and extraordinary momentum. ## SPECIFICATION DB2M70BC-Y-粗哑面1600X3200X12MM 12 MM ## FEATURES
APPLYTOSPACE

ocr.text:
## 阿勒闪电 ## DESCRIPTION 无以复加的天然质感，经久不衰的黑白色调，呈现出一种超越边界之美，如闪电般的纹理，又如激起荡漾的波光，带来强烈视觉冲击，空间表现力强，尽显新潮时尚风。 Unsurpassed natural texture and enduring black and white tones present a beauty that transcends boundaries. The texture is like lightning and rippling waves, which brings a strong visual impact.It has a strong spatial expressiveness and shows the trendy fashion style. ## SPECIFICATION DB2M90CC-Y-粗哑面+数码纹理通体1600X3200X12MM 12MM ## FEATURES
APPLYTOSPACE
